message:
chore(gitignore): ignore .claude/settings.local.json

.claude/settings.local.json is Claude Code's per-user local-permissions
override file. Its contents (allowed tool globs, per-repo MCP server
auth, local-only prompt preferences) are specific to each developer's
machine and contain no value for other contributors. Prevents noisy
"modified" entries in `git status` and keeps tool-specific toggles from
leaking across environments.

files.patch:
@@ -183,3 +183,4 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # NTM per-repo state (rate-limit tracking, session metadata) — regenerated on demand
 .ntm/
+.claude/settings.local.json
